title: The Emergence: Spark Protocol Classification
description: 72-question psychological classification quiz. Your personality is your power.

questions.question: When something genuinely good finally happens to you, what is your honest reaction?

answers.A: I start organizing it -- already thinking about how to make the most of it.
answers.B: It bursts out of me. I can't keep it contained and I don't try.
answers.C: A jolt of energy -- I want to be up and moving.
answers.D: A quiet, settled feeling, like something heavy clicked into place.
answers.E: I look around at everyone else, reading whether they feel it too.
answers.F: I keep it to myself for a while before I let anyone know.

choices.A: I start organizing it -- already thinking about how to make the most of it.
choices.B: It bursts out of me. I can't keep it contained and I don't try.
choices.C: A jolt of energy -- I want to be up and moving.
choices.D: A quiet, settled feeling, like something heavy clicked into place.
choices.E: I look around at everyone else, reading whether they feel it too.
choices.F: I keep it to myself for a while before I let anyone know.

questions.question: Someone insults you in a way that actually stings. Underneath, what happens?

answers.A: I plant my feet. I'm not going anywhere and I'm not going to crumble.
answers.B: A hot flare of anger I have to decide whether to let out.
answers.C: I step back mentally and start analyzing why they said it.
answers.D: I'm already three comebacks ahead, talking before I've thought.
answers.E: I go still and quiet and give them nothing to read.
answers.F: I shift my whole manner to throw them off balance.

choices.A: I plant my feet. I'm not going anywhere and I'm not going to crumble.
choices.B: A hot flare of anger I have to decide whether to let out.
choices.C: I step back mentally and start analyzing why they said it.
choices.D: I'm already three comebacks ahead, talking before I've thought.
choices.E: I go still and quiet and give them nothing to read.
choices.F: I shift my whole manner to throw them off balance.

questions.question: What do you trust most about yourself when things get hard?

answers.A: That I can quietly remove myself from a bad situation.
answers.B: That when I finally commit, I commit completely.
answers.C: That I can take a beating and still be standing.
answers.D: That I'll instinctively find what the moment needs.
answers.E: That I can keep a clear head and manage the chaos.
answers.F: That I'll spot the opening before anyone else does.

choices.A: That I can quietly remove myself from a bad situation.

choices.C: That I can take a beating and still be standing.
choices.D: That I'll instinctively find what the moment needs.
choices.E: That I can keep a clear head and manage the chaos.
choices.F: That I'll spot the opening before anyone else does.

questions.question: How do you most like to occupy a space -- a party, an office, a room?

answers.A: I read the room and blend into whatever it needs.
answers.B: I bring the energy; the mood tends to follow me.
answers.C: I'm a steady, solid presence people can lean on.
answers.D: I like a vantage point where I can see and steer everything.
answers.E: I move around constantly; I hate being pinned in one spot.
answers.F: I prefer the edges, where I can watch without being watched.

questions.question: Which kind of flexibility are you proudest of in yourself?

answers.A: How fast I can change direction when plans fall apart.
answers.B: How much I can take before I bend at all.
answers.C: How well I can hold many moving parts in my head at once.
answers.D: How completely I can throw myself into one thing.
answers.E: How easily I take on whatever a situation asks of me.
answers.F: How I can slip out of commitments that no longer fit.

questions.question: Once you've truly committed to something, which word fits you best?

answers.A: Immovable -- nothing talks me out of it.
answers.B: Adaptive -- I become whatever finishing it requires.
answers.C: Discreet -- I'd rather no one know it was me.
answers.D: Quick -- I want it done before the moment passes.
answers.E: Intense -- I go all in, full heat.
answers.F: Deliberate -- I steer the whole thing from the center.

choices.B: Adaptive -- I become whatever finishing it requires.
choices.C: Discreet -- I'd rather no one know it was me.
choices.D: Quick -- I want it done before the moment passes.
choices.E: Intense -- I go all in, full heat.
choices.F: Deliberate -- I steer the whole thing from the center.

questions.question: Where does your sense of self-worth honestly come from?

answers.A: Carrying loads other people can't.
answers.B: Knowing I can stay self-contained and need no one.
answers.C: Being impossible to ignore when I show up.
answers.D: Being the one who keeps everything organized and running.
answers.E: Fitting in and thriving anywhere I'm dropped.
answers.F: Being faster off the mark than everyone around me.

questions.question: What's the quiet thing you're certain no one can take from you?

answers.A: My privacy -- the parts of me I never show.
answers.B: My instincts; they've never really failed me.
answers.C: My reflexes -- I react before I think.
answers.D: My judgment and the way I see the whole board.
answers.E: My fire; I feel things all the way down.
answers.F: My endurance -- I outlast almost anything.

questions.question: Be honest about heights -- standing at the edge of a tall roof, you feel:

answers.A: A thrilling rush; part of me wants to whoop into the open air.
answers.B: Solid and unbothered; my feet feel rooted.
answers.C: A restless itch, calculating the drop and the routes down.
answers.D: Detached and analytical, taking in the whole view from above.
answers.E: Exposed -- I'd rather step back where no one can see me.
answers.F: Alert in an animal way, every sense suddenly sharp.

questions.question: Which secret wish is most you?

answers.A: To handle a dozen things at once without dropping any.
answers.B: To go anywhere I want the instant I want to.
answers.C: To slip into places unseen and leave no trace.
answers.D: To be so solid that no problem could move me.
answers.E: To make the natural world feel like an extension of me.
answers.F: To unleash everything I've got, all at once, just once.

questions.question: How do you most naturally reach another person?

answers.A: By matching or shifting their emotional temperature.
answers.B: By being a dependable rock they can hold onto.
answers.C: By thinking through what they need and arranging it.
answers.D: By closing the gap fast, before the moment cools.
answers.E: Quietly, one on one, away from everyone else.
answers.F: By tuning myself to their mood until we're in sync.

questions.question: When you picture being truly free, what's the image?

answers.A: Everything under my control, exactly where I want it.
answers.B: Letting loose with no one telling me to hold back.
answers.C: Living by instinct, in step with the world around me.
answers.D: The open road and the power to just go.
answers.E: A place that's mine, that nothing can push me out of.
answers.F: Being able to disappear whenever I please.

questions.question: When you decide you're going to win, what's your honest first move?

answers.A: Hit hard and early, with everything I've got.
answers.B: Feel out the opponent and adapt to what they show me.
answers.C: Get there first; speed is my edge.
answers.D: Stay unseen and pick my moment.
answers.E: Take control of the variables and arrange them my way.
answers.F: Meet them head on and simply outlast and overpower them.

questions.question: What kind of resilience best describes you?

answers.A: I bounce off and keep moving; I don't dwell.
answers.B: I step back, reassess, and re-plan around the hit.
answers.C: I absorb it and don't break.
answers.D: I withdraw, regroup quietly, and re-emerge later.
answers.E: I get more fired up the harder things push.
answers.F: I change myself to survive what's coming.

answers.A: I shoulder it and refuse to let it slip.

answers.D: I pour myself into it completely until it's done.

answers.F: I quietly handle it alone without making it anyone's business.

answers.A: Being so in tune with everything that I never feel out of place.

answers.D: Being the mind everyone defers to.
answers.E: Being the one who holds steady when everything shakes.
answers.F: Being the one who's already gone before you turn around.

answers.A: Let momentum build naturally and ride the conditions.

answers.D: Sprint at it and close the distance fast.
answers.E: Go at it in passionate, full-throttle bursts.
answers.F: Work at it quietly until it's suddenly done.

answers.E: My overview; I track all of it at once.
answers.F: My gut read of where things are heading.

answers.D: Let them miss that I've already arranged the outcome.

answers.F: Let them ignore the pressure building in me until it's too late.

answers.D: I become a slightly different person and carry on.
answers.E: I let it all out in one cathartic release.
answers.F: I take the strain and spring back; I'm built to flex and hold.

choices.F: My sense that I can shift the whole climate of a moment.

questions.question: Which kind of influence feels most honest to you?

answers.A: Outgrowing whatever's currently limiting me.
answers.B: Shifting how a room feels without saying a word.
answers.C: Becoming exactly what a situation demands.
answers.D: Patiently growing the outcome I want.
answers.E: Setting the emotional weather others live in.
answers.F: Reading and acting on instinct before logic catches up.

choices.A: Outgrowing whatever's currently limiting me.
choices.B: Shifting how a room feels without saying a word.
choices.C: Becoming exactly what a situation demands.
choices.D: Patiently growing the outcome I want.
choices.E: Setting the emotional weather others live in.
choices.F: Reading and acting on instinct before logic catches up.

questions.question: What's your truest relationship to change?

answers.A: I change how others feel; their mood follows mine.
answers.B: I become the change -- I turn into something new.
answers.C: I cultivate change patiently in the world around me.
answers.D: I bring it like a shift in the weather.
answers.E: I meet it on instinct, the way an animal does.
answers.F: I embody it -- I never stay one fixed thing for long.
